---
title: 'Abide!'
date: '2010-04-28T20:29:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3071250524163957715'
blogger_filename: '/2010/04/abide.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John%2014-15&amp;version=NKJV"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>John 14-15</i></span></a><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i><br /></i></span><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">John 14</span></i><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></i><br /><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26667" style="line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">2</span></i></span></sup><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">&nbsp;In My Father’s house are many mansions.</span></i><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></i><br /><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26678" style="line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">13</span></i></span></sup><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">&nbsp;And whatever you ask in My name, that I will do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son.&nbsp;</span></i><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26679" style="line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">14</span></i></span></sup><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">&nbsp;If you ask</span></i><sup class="footnote" style="line-height: 0.5em;" value="[&lt;a href=&quot;#fen-NKJV-26679c&quot; title=&quot;See footnote c&quot;&gt;c&lt;/a&gt;]"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">[</span></i></span><a href="http://www.blogger.com/post-edit.g?blogID=6583916183087899714&amp;postID=7823380240830125561#fen-NKJV-26679c" title="See footnote c"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">c</span></i></span></a><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">]</span></i></span></sup><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">&nbsp;anything in My name, I will do&nbsp;</span></i><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">it.</span></i><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></i><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">John 15</span></i><br /><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></i><br /><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26700" style="line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: medium;"><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">4</span></i></span></sup><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">&nbsp;Abide in Me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, unless it abides in the vine, neither can you, unless you abide in Me</span></i><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i><br /></i></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 16px;"><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26705" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>9</i></span></sup></span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 16px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;“As the Father loved Me, I also have loved you; abide in My love.&nbsp;</i></span></span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 16px;"><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26706" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>10</i></span></sup></span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 16px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;If you keep My commandments, you will abide in My love, just as I have kept My Father’s commandments and abide in His love.&nbsp;</i></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 16px;"><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26707" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>11</i></span></sup><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;“These things I have spoken to you, that My joy may remain in you, and&nbsp;</i></span><i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;">that</span></i><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;your joy may be full.&nbsp;</i></span><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26708" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>12</i></span></sup><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;This is My commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you.&nbsp;</i></span><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26709" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>13</i></span></sup><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;Greater love has no one than this, than to lay down one’s life for his friends.&nbsp;</i></span><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-26710" style="font-size: 0.65em; font-weight: bold; line-height: normal; vertical-align: text-top;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>14</i></span></sup><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><i>&nbsp;You are My friends if you do whatever I command you.</i></span></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">It's funny. You can think of gold streets and it's an easy transition to mansions. I wonder why it's so hard to get a mansion mentality here and now. The idea that you walk into a nice place or a model that is out of your "budget" and feel out of place just being there is a strange idea. For most people ANY model home is out of&nbsp;their&nbsp;budget. That's why they have to go over to the bank and beg them for a loan. It doesn't matter whether the house is $400K or $2.5MM or $25. Who cares? It's out of YOUR budget. It is the rare person who even considers the idea of buying a house outright cash in hand. But if God is my provider and HE has mansions and gold streets, I am REQUIRED to change my mindset. HE is my provider. NOT the internet, or the next big idea, or the next scheme, or the next job... HE and HE ALONE.&nbsp;</span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">If I ask, He will do it. Hands Down. He already promised houses to me in his word in several places. So a house is what I expect.&nbsp;</span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">Are there prerequisites? Yes! ABIDE... this is more than just read it every morning, say a prayer if your remember and try to be a good person. Darrell Glen Wolfe.... You need to ABIDE... live, breath, talk, dream, The Word of God and beyond ALL OF THAT... you still need to abide. Isn't that abiding? Yes, it's all part of it. But Abiding is deeper than those things. Abiding means time spent talking WITH Him. <b>Not:</b></span><br /><br /><ul><li><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">Talking AT Him</span></li><li><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">Giving Him your grocery list of needs, wants, and desires</span></li></ul><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">But actually sitting down with Him and discussing things, life, the universe, what HE wants today... etc... ABIDE</span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">Imagine ABIDING with your wife and never talking with her about anything except what you want from her. She wouldn't ABIDE with you like that forever. Children do this and we train them out of it. It's time to mature and grow.&nbsp;</span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">The ONLY way to have true JOY which is deeper than happiness, is to abide. It means you can sit still, for extended periods of time, with nothing to distract, entertain, or amuse you except HIM. That is Abiding... it is the goal of my life from this day forward. When I catch myself NOT abiding... I will repent and turn.&nbsp;</span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span></div><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><iframe align="left" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=bpl&amp;asins=157683655X&amp;fc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;lt1=_blank&amp;m=amazon&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;bc1=000000&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;f=ifr" style="align: left; height: 245px; padding-right: 10px; padding-top: 5px; width: 131px;"></iframe></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><iframe align="left" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=bpl&amp;asins=1602665702&amp;fc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;lt1=_blank&amp;m=amazon&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;bc1=000000&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;f=ifr" style="align: left; height: 245px; padding-right: 10px; padding-top: 5px; width: 131px;"></iframe></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;">.</span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span><br /><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><br /></span>
